acceptance_criteria.given: agents/changelog-analyst.md after the fix is applied
acceptance_criteria.then: PUSH_GATE_SID MUST use the three-part fallback: try CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID, then CLAUDE_SESSION_ID, then default 'unknown'. A two-part get(..., 'unknown') is NOT acceptable. Specifically, the text must contain the exact three-part or-chain form: os.environ.get('CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_SESSION_ID') or 'unknown' — NOT the two-part default= form os.environ.get('CLAUDE_SESSION_ID', 'unknown') and NOT a nested-default form. This deviates from the user's literal text by design: the or-chain handles empty-string env vars (Codex finding #2) whereas the default= form does not. The resolved PUSH_GATE_SID value must be used for the session_id field in the push-gate token JSON.

check.expected: match found: PUSH_GATE_SID assignment using the exact three-part or-chain with bare get() calls (no default argument on either lookup) — a pattern matching only CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID is insufficient and MUST NOT be used as the sole verification
check.negative_pattern_note: Matches any form that passes a default positional argument to either os.environ.get() call — includes the forbidden user-literal form (os.environ.get('CLAUDE_SESSION_ID', 'unknown')) AND the nested-default form. If this pattern matches, the implementation is non-conforming.

acceptance_criteria.given: agents/changelog-analyst.md after the fix is applied
acceptance_criteria.when: dev reads DO NOT rule #7 (around lines 36-37) and Phase 10 overwrite-guard prose
acceptance_criteria.then: both the token write and the overwrite comparison reference the same named PUSH_GATE_SID variable (or equivalent explicit reference), not two different env var lookups that could diverge

check.expected: DO NOT rule #7 references the same session value defined in Phase 10 for PUSH_GATE_SID

acceptance_criteria.when: dev compares pre-fix and post-fix content
acceptance_criteria.then: line 75 (manifest SID) is unchanged; hooks/push.sh is unchanged; scripts/execute-push.py is unchanged; only the Phase 10 push-gate session_id description and DO NOT rule #7 are modified
